description: Realistic integration test: find HN AI stories and summarize them
user_input: Find the top 5 Hacker News stories about AI today and summarize them.
skip_reason: Requires LLM API key (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set) and pi-ai package (not in node_modules). The full LLM governance path (agents/bossbot.ts -> governance-loop -> agents/creatorbot.ts -> agents/employee.ts) is not connected to governance/common/subagent.ts (structural gap documented in packet-22-integration-design.md). This test is documented as deferred to a future integration packet when LLM availability and governance-loop -> new-Subagent wiring are both complete.
what_this_would_test: Real LLM calls via pi-ai (BossBot decompose, AdvisorBot critique)
CreatorBot spawning new Subagent with CAMPAIGN.md transition table
fetch_then_extract Martian: url_fetch -> extract_json for HN content
